topic: Automation reality supplemental research: deepen 012's 4 P1 aspirational findings via adversarial Hunter→Skeptic→Referee, probe under-covered surfaces (deep-loop graph, CCC + eval + ablation, validator auto-fire), output sequenced remediation backlog (packets 031-035)
